final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input rst,
	 input [31:0] in,
    output reg [31:0] out
    );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt)
      if (rst) begin
			out <= 32'b0;
      end else begin
			out <= in;
      end
endmodule
